subject: Mac fan loud and sluggish during video calls
description: During Zoom/Meet laptop gets hot, fans ramp, UI stutters; happens on desk without bed blocking vents.

ts_steps.title: Activity Monitor
ts_steps.action: Identify CPU hogs; quit unnecessary apps; close browser tabs with heavy video.

ts_steps.title: Energy settings
ts_steps.action: On battery vs power adapter — test on AC; disable high-power external displays temporarily.

ts_steps.title: SMC reset guidance
ts_steps.action: Per Apple steps for model (Intel vs Apple Silicon differ); clean vents if dusty.

internal_information: Thermal paste age on Intel, background indexer, or runaway process. Hardware service if idle temps abnormal.
